allow: Bash(python -m py_compile bot.py config.py db.py handlers.py mentions.py)

Bash(python -c "import urllib.request, json; data = json.loads\(urllib.request.urlopen\('https://pypi.org/pypi/psycopg-binary/json'\).read\(\)\); files = [f['filename'] for f in data['urls']]; print\('Latest version:', data['info']['version']\); print\('cp314 files:'\); [print\(' ', f\) for f in files if 'cp314' in f]")

Bash(python -c "import urllib.request, json; data = json.loads\(urllib.request.urlopen\('https://pypi.org/pypi/asyncpg/json'\).read\(\)\); files = [f['filename'] for f in data['urls']]; print\('Latest version:', data['info']['version']\); print\('cp314 files:'\); [print\(' ', f\) for f in files if 'cp314' in f]")
